---
title: "Leia Kawamura"
image: "files/0151.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:lekawamura@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/princessleiak
---

Welcome to my website!

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
